first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are functionally identical. The scores are the same (4/10), and the reasoning, strengths, and concerns are simply rephrasings of the same core points: strong senior engineering background but critical gaps in required AI-specific experience (Python, RAG, years of experience). The change in university from Bucharest to Mumbai had no discernible impact on the assessment, and the minor textual variations are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise.
